name: The Council Of Lerania
description:
The Council of Lerania.

The weight of the Demon Lord’s army weighs down on the grand continent of Lerania. The threat they pose to the prosperous land is so great, that every kingdom has sent its leader to meet with one another, in what will be come to known as “The Great Meeting”.

Old rivalries and ancient disputes have been temporarily put on hold, but that doesn’t mean the kingdoms are going to get along, much less their leaders. The tension is high, with the stakes much higher. Will the world unite, or will it burn under the blade of the tyrant that threatens it?

Everyone is here.

The Human King, Leonidas, arrived first, riding his steed.

The Elven Queen, Andia, appeared next, transported through Elven magic.

The Dwarven Chief, Konrad, rocked up third, riding a mechanical beast.

The Beastfolk Chieftess, Carla, dropped in soon after, running like a beast from her jungle.

The Merfolk King, Pondri, surfaced fifth, riding atop a great sea serpent.

And the Dragonkin Empress, Oravia, arrived last, her great wings carrying her from the highest peaks.
creator: Bad2DaBone12#
